generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights into building performance metrics for immediate decision-making"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights into potential system failures and maintenance requirements"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from simulated scenarios for design and operational optimization"
]

instance DataAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational data analysis insights for informed decision-making"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized resource allocation and energy efficiency recommendations"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for continuous tracking of building performance metrics",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for forecasting building system failures and maintenance needs",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for virtual testing of design and operational scenarios",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance DataAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data analysis service for extracting insights from operational data",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for improving energy efficiency and resource allocation",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance MDEProcessor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) processor for extracting structured representations from BIM models and generating deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention modular architecture features standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics, enabling evolution of the Digital Twin in response to operational changes",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics, SimulationService, DataAnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) model enriched with sensors, actuators, and controllers providing a unified semantic foundation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEProcessor
]

instance BIMModelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) model component providing a unified semantic foundation"
]

instance MDEProcessorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) processor component for extracting structured representations and generating deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service component for continuous tracking of building performance metrics"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service component for forecasting building system failures and maintenance needs"
]

instance SimulationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Simulation service component for virtual testing of design and operational scenarios"
]

instance DataAnalysisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data analysis service component for extracting insights from operational data"
]

instance OptimizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Optimization service component for improving energy efficiency and resource allocation"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A cyber-physical asset within the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, such as a building, characterized by complex and heterogeneous data sources requiring integration of static models with real-time operational data for simulation, analysis, and optimization across the entire lifecycle from design to operation and refurbishment.",
    base:contains BIMModelComponent, MDEProcessorComponent, RealTimeMonitoringComponent, PredictiveAnalyticsComponent, SimulationComponent, DataAnalysisComponent, OptimizationComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals transmitted from the digital twin to physical systems via bidirectional data exchange, allowing Facility Managers to monitor and adjust building operations in real time."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system maintains real-time synchronization between physical assets and the virtual representation through continuous data exchange, enabling real-time monitoring and analysis. This synchronization is critical for providing immediate insights and supporting dynamic decision-making processes in the AECO domain."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs a model-driven framework that integrates Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion and Ditto for digital twin management, utilizing Unreal Engine for high-fidelity visualization. The architecture is modular with defined extension points, and the DT Framework acts as a central hub coordinating all components, ensuring seamless orchestration and system-wide coordination."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics, and runtime configuration management enabling adjustments without full redeployment."
]
